pi_items.source: Task instructions and standard Oracle Analytics Desktop file extension (.dva).
Explicitly stated in task instructions and confirmed to exist in the "Product Category" column of the dataset.
Verified against the environment configuration scripts which use the "Docker" user profile.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the standard Oracle synthetic "Sample Order Lines" dataset. Code execution confirms that the "sample_order_lines2023.xlsx" file contains "Product Category" and "Profit" columns, and the "Technology" category is present. The metadata claims (expected filename, title, filter category, target value, and max value) all perfectly match the explicit task instructions. The documents path matches the environment"s "Docker" user setup.
